message:
docs(actor): document stop()/abort() identical behavior (bd-2orw)

Both methods currently set cancel_requested. Differentiating them
(stop drains buffered messages, abort exits immediately) requires
actor loop refactoring. Added doc comments explaining the current
behavior and the planned improvement.

Also closed bd-3hoc, bd-1kvh (already covered by http_e2e/grpc_e2e).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
